items.creator: @arkreen_network
items.title:
RT by @hectorc05: Roam 🌐 x Arkreen 🌿 partnership is live! 🚀

🔗 Roam the world, connect the people, green the planet. 🌍

Roam's decentralized telecom data layer 🛰 + Arkreen’s on-chain offset protocol with green energy ⚡️ = Carbon-neutral Green DePIN Wireless Networks! 🌱🌍

💡 Rewarding Sustainable Practices: The Plug for Green (PGP) program integrates Roam miners with Arkreen’s Smart Plugs. Now, miners can monitor electricity use and on-chain offset carbon emissions with tokenized RECs, earning even more rewards while promoting a sustainable future. 🌱⚡️

Read the full blog here https://medium.com/@arkreen/global-depin-wireless-networks-meets-green-roam-and-arkreens-plug-for-green-partnership-8548d3b9ec3c

#DeWi #DePIN #GreenEnergy #CarbonNeutral #Web3 #PGP #Sustainability #RECs

items.creator: @Weaver_Labs
items.title:
RT by @theYEVile: 🚀🌐 We are thrilled to announce our new partnership with Arkreen! 

🌿🔋@arkreen_network, a pioneer in Web3-powered digital infrastructure for globally distributed renewable energy resources, is joining forces with us. 

They plan to explore how our network solutions  can be integrated into its Community-Owned Solar Programs (CSPs) across Europe.

Weaver Labs will utilize Arkreen's Plug for Green Program (PGP) to monitor energy consumption within our network infrastructure, enhancing sustainability and efficiency. 

🤝 Together, Weaver Labs and @arkreen_network are committed to bridging the gap in the #DePIN world, driving sustainable and innovative solutions to the forefront of industry advancements. 

🔗 Stay tuned as we redefine the possibilities of integrated technology and renewable energy, creating a more connected and sustainable future. 🌍💡
items.dc:creator: @Weaver_Labs
items.content:
🚀🌐 We are thrilled to announce our new partnership with Arkreen!

🌿🔋@arkreen_network, a pioneer in Web3-powered digital infrastructure for globally distributed renewable energy resources, is joining forces with us.

They plan to explore how our network solutions can be integrated into its Community-Owned Solar Programs (CSPs) across Europe.

Weaver Labs will utilize Arkreen's Plug for Green Program (PGP) to monitor energy consumption within our network infrastructure, enhancing sustainability and efficiency.

🤝 Together, Weaver Labs and @arkreen_network are committed to bridging the gap in the #DePIN world, driving sustainable and innovative solutions to the forefront of industry advancements.

🔗 Stay tuned as we redefine the possibilities of integrated technology and renewable energy, creating a more connected and sustainable future. 🌍💡

items.creator: @arkreen_network
items.title:
RT by @ABDULMANNA5788: 🌍⚡️ At the fireside chat during the 10th Global Blockchain Summit, Leo Lin @linyao01 , founder of Arkreen, and John Chen, VP of Sungrow, the world’s #1 solar inverter manufacturer, stressed that the energy sector is at a turning point. Both believe that Web3 and distributed renewable energy can overcome traditional energy limits, paving the way for a global decentralized energy network future.

Arkreen will continue to partner with Sungrow to explore how DePIN is driving the transformation of the energy industry and unlocking new opportunities in the renewable energy market.

🌱🔗 full blog here: https://medium.com/@arkreen/powering-the-green-future-with-distributed-renewable-energy-and-depin-arkreen-and-sungrow-866ab8743450

 #GreenEnergy #DePIN #DeGEN #Sustainability

items.creator: @arkreen_network
items.title:
RT by @Nupur956817: ⚡️ Green DePIN Initiative: Arkreen 🤝 PowerPod Partnership

PowerPod @PowerPod_People  and Arkreen are joining forces to bring on-chain carbon offsets to Asia’s fast-growing two-wheel electric motorcycle market 🌱🔋 With over 200M electric motorcycles already on the road, we’re enabling green, net-zero charging and driving sustainable mobility 🚀

Get ready for REAL users, REAL income, REAL rewards, and real-time carbon offsets! 🌍⚡️ 

https://medium.com/@arkreen/charging-green-how-arkreens-on-chain-offset-empowers-powerpod-s-sustainable-two-wheel-electric-eb4b93013039

#GreenDePIN #ElectricMobility #Sustainability #CarbonNeutral #DePIN #DeGEN

RT by @pendoel80: 🚨 Arkreen Community, we’re in the First Round of Online Voting for the Sustainable Innovation Summit! 🌍
Vote for us and show your support! 🎉 After voting, send us a screenshot, and we’ll randomly select 10 lucky participants daily. Each winner will receive 1 Lite Remote Miner + 0.1 ART 🙌

🗳 Cast your vote now for the 17 SDG Challenge!  https://blockchainforgood.xyz/vote/7

Together, let’s tackle global challenges with blockchain technology! 💪🌱

#VoteForArkreen #SustainableInnovation #BlockchainForGood #DePIN #ReFi #DeGEN
